title: Smart Inventory
description: Simple QoL plugin: auto-refill, tool/armor autoswap, and chest & inventory sorting with a single F key.
body:
## Smart Inventory
![BANNER](https://res.cloudinary.com/dhgdy73up/image/upload/v1767147540/ChatGPT_Image_30_dic_2025_08_18_14_p.m._a4twh7.png)
> Tiny quality-of-life plugin that makes your survival worlds feel **much smoother**:

- **Auto-refill** blocks, food and throwable items in your hotbar  
- **Auto-swap** tools, weapons and armor when they break  
- **Smart chest & inventory sorting** (by type, name or category)  
- Everything is driven by the **F key** – no weird keybinds

### Commands

- `/smartinv on|off|status` – toggle Smart Inventory (refill + autoswap)
- `/smartchest on|off|status` – toggle Smart Chest (sorting + F moves)

### Controls (default)

- Press **F** on a chest slot → quick-pull / quick-stack that item type

![1](https://res.cloudinary.com/dhgdy73up/image/upload/v1765044067/3_inales.gif)
  

- Press **F** on an empty chest slot → move **everything**
  
  ![2](https://res.cloudinary.com/dhgdy73up/image/upload/v1765044066/2_kvqfzv.gif)
  
    
- Press **F** in your inventory → send items to the open chest 

![4](https://res.cloudinary.com/dhgdy73up/image/upload/v1765044066/4_va9uqp.gif)


- Double-click in a chest → sort using your current mode

![3](https://res.cloudinary.com/dhgdy73up/image/upload/v1765044068/1_l9tvyp.gif)


---

🇪🇸 **Resumen rápido**

- Rellena automáticamente tus bloques y comida  
- Cambia herramienta/armadura al romperse  
- Ordena cofres e inventario con una tecla (**F**)  
- Solo dos comandos: `/smartinv on|off|status` y `/smartchest on|off|status`
